title: stelis tintinnabula
intro: Stelis tintinnabula, also known as the bell-stelis, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in tropical regions, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis tintinnabula include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its flowers in hot water or mixing its extract with other herbs, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
